heading: Limited Commands
body:
Atlas limits the [db.killOp()](manual/reference/method/db.killOp) method to
the MongoDB user who ran the operation.

Atlas supports the following sharding command on only
`M30+` sharded clusters:

| Command                | Shell Method           | Privilege Action  |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------- | ----------------- |
| abortRewriteCollection |                        | rewriteCollection |
| reshardCollection      | sh.reshardCollection() | reshardCollection |
| rewriteCollection      |                        | rewriteCollection |
| unshardCollection      | sh.unshardCollection() | unshardCollection |
